name: Toll House Cookies
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter until creamy.
4. Gradually add granulated sugar and brown sugar, beating well after each addition.
5. Blend in vanilla extract.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Gradually add flour mixture to the butter mixture.
8. Stir in Nestle Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels and chopped nuts.
9. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
10. Bake until golden brown, about 20-25 minutes.
11. Allow cookies to cool completely.
Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
